tips_en: Start with OpenSearch-VL, which delivers a fully open-source, end-to-end recipe for frontier multimodal search agents and achieves strong, reproducible gains. Its agentic RL framework directly connects to MiA-Signature’s global memory-retrieval perspective and to MARBLE’s multi-objective gradient balancing techniques.
tips_zh: 建议优先阅读 OpenSearch-VL，它提供了构建前沿多模态搜索智能体的完整开源方案，实证收益显著且可复现性强。其智能体强化学习框架与 MiA-Signature 的记忆检索视角以及 MARBLE 的多目标梯度平衡方法存在紧密的方法论关联。
